claim: Ly6C hi monocytes have a higher inflammatory capacity than Ly6C lo monocytes.
evidence_sentences: Under inflammatory conditions elicited either by acute infection with Listeria monocytogenes or chronic infection with Leishmania major, there was a significant increase in immature Ly-6C(high) monocytes, resembling the inflammatory left shift of granulocytes.
In addition, acute peritoneal inflammation recruited preferentially Ly-6C(med-high) monocytes.
